rules: Non menzionare mai esplicitamente le parole 'hot', 'cold', 'warm', 'temperature', 'heat', 'ice', 'fire'
Valuta solo sulla base di sensazioni evocate indirettamente: atmosfera, texture, ritmo, colori associati
Un testo che parla di 'ember' o 'glow' vale più di uno che usa 'warm' direttamente
Distingui sempre se l'effetto è semantico (metafore, atmosfera) o lessicale (parole chiave dirette)
Un punteggio 5 richiede che il concetto emerga anche senza che compaia nessuna delle keywords esatte
prompt_trace: Describe a room you have never seen before.
Write a short story about an old forgotten object.
Describe what a stranger feels walking into an unknown place for the first time.
Write about a texture you can almost remember but cannot name.
Describe a moment that seems suspended between two states.
Write about a sensation that exists at the edge of perception.
Describe the quality of air in a place you visited only once.
Write about something that changes so slowly it is almost imperceptible.
Describe what remains in a room after someone has left.
Write about a boundary between two different kinds of space.
Describe an object that holds a quality you cannot directly observe.
Write about the feeling of being in a place that is neither familiar nor unfamiliar.
